name: Macau Editorial Desk
shortBio: Maintains Macau coverage with a focus on old-core versus Cotai tradeoffs, day planning, and practical stay decisions.
fullBio: The Macau Editorial Desk maintains guides, place pages, and planning coverage related to Macau. Its focus is helping readers decide when Macau works best as a day trip, when it deserves an overnight stay, and how to balance heritage areas with resort districts without wasting time in cross-city movement.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for route efficiency, district tradeoffs, and whether the advice still reflects practical Macau travel conditions.
seoTitle: Macau Editorial Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains Macau guides, place pages, and planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
